repair_candidate.summary: Repair #80473 in place by rebasing the maintainer-modifiable contributor branch onto current main, resolving only the native-command-route.ts conflict, and preserving the narrow type-only fix that replaces ReturnType/Awaited-derived route-state aliases with explicit non-any SDK-backed types.
repair_candidate.pr_title: fix(discord): resolve redundant type constituents in native-command-route
repair_candidate.pr_body:
## Summary
- Rebase #80473 onto current main and resolve only the stale native-command-route.ts conflict.
- Preserve @KhanCold's narrow fix for #80428 by replacing ReturnType/Awaited-derived route-state aliases with explicit non-any SDK-backed types.
- Keep runtime behavior unchanged: the route resolver should still call resolveConfiguredBindingRoute and ensureConfiguredBindingRouteReady in the same places and return the same state fields.

## Verification
- git diff --check
- node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs --tsconfig config/tsconfig/oxlint.extensions.json extensions/discord/src/monitor/native-command-route.ts
- node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/discord/src/monitor/native-command.plugin-dispatch.test.ts extensions/discord/src/monitor/native-command.think-autocomplete.test.ts
- node scripts/crabbox-wrapper.mjs run --provider blacksmith-testbox -- env OPENCLAW_CHECK_CHANGED_REMOTE_CHILD=1 OPENCLAW_CHANGED_LANES_RAW_SYNC=1 corepack pnpm check:changed

Refs: #80473, fixes #80428. Source PR credit: @KhanCold.
